description: Fig. 11: Downward compatibility - adoption threshold model only (opinion dynamics removed)

expected_outcome.description: All agents adopt within 50 ticks. Adoption dynamics show characteristic S-curve. New adopter dynamics show peak at critical point. No opinion exchange occurs (bounded-confidence=0).

note: Validates BCAT downward compatibility with pure adoption threshold models. Setting bounded-confidence=0 disables opinion exchange. Setting avg-of-attitudes=100 with std=0 gives all agents identical maximum attitudes.
